subtitle: Paste an IMDb or TMDB ID and press play.
step1Desc: Find a movie on IMDb or TMDB.
step2Desc: Enter it into the search field.
faq1a: No. Just paste the ID and start watching instantly.
faq2q: What if the movie doesn't load?
faq2a: Try switching between Global and Arabic sources below the player.
faq3a: All content is embedded from public third-party sources. We do not host any videos.
faq4a: Yes! Select TV Show, enter the ID, season and episode number.
faq5a: Both IMDb IDs (tt1234567) and TMDB IDs (numbers like 550) are supported.
modalText: This platform does not host, store, or control any video files. All content is embedded from independent third-party sources. By proceeding, you accept our terms.
modalBul1: We do not host, upload, or store media files on our servers.
modalBul2: All content is embedded from independent third-party providers.
modalBul3: We are not responsible for the availability or legality of third-party content.
modalBul4: You are solely responsible for complying with your local laws.
modalBul5: Use this service entirely at your own risk.
modalCheckLabel: I have read, understood, and explicitly agree to the Terms and Policies.
discSection1Text: MovoraStar does not host, store, upload, or distribute any video files, films, television shows, or copyrighted media on its servers. All content displayed within the player interface is embedded from publicly available third-party services over which we have no control, ownership, or affiliation.
discSection2Text: The streaming gateway operates solely as a navigation tool that retrieves and presents content located on external, independent platforms. These third-party sources operate their own servers, maintain their own content libraries, and are solely responsible for the legality of the material they make available.
discSection3Text: Under no circumstances shall MovoraStar, its operators, or affiliates be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of this website or the inability to access any embedded content. This includes, but is not limited to, claims of copyright infringement, data loss, or service interruption.
discSection4Text: All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners. If you believe that any content accessible through this gateway infringes upon your copyright, please direct your complaint to the appropriate third-party source that hosts the content. MovoraStar is not in a position to remove or modify content hosted on external servers.
discSection5TextPre: By using this service, you acknowledge that:
discSection5Item1: You are solely responsible for complying with the applicable laws of your jurisdiction.
discSection5Item2: Accessing copyrighted material without proper authorization may be illegal in your country.
discSection5Item3: This tool is provided for educational and informational purposes only.
discSection5Item4: You will not use this service for any unlawful activity.
discSection6Text: MovoraStar makes no guarantees regarding the availability, accuracy, or quality of any embedded content. Third-party sources may go offline, restrict access, or remove content at any time without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.
discHighlight: By continuing to use MovoraStar, you accept and agree to the terms outlined in this disclaimer. If you do not agree with any part of this notice, you must discontinue use of this website immediately.
discMetaDesc: Disclaimer and legal notice for MovoraStar — a streaming gateway that embeds content from third-party sources.
priv1Text: We do not require user registration or log profiles. MovoraStar operates entirely without collecting, storing, or soliciting personal identifiable data from its users.
priv2Text: We utilize client-side LocalStorage to maintain user experience choices, such as language filters and your acknowledgment of our legal disclaimers. This data is never sent to our servers.
priv3Text: لا تتطلب المنصة إنشاء أي حسابات أو تسجيل سجلات دخول. تعمل MovoraStar بالكامل دون جمع أو تخزين أو طلب أي بيانات أو هويات شخصية من زائريها.
priv4Text: نحن نستخدم ميزة LocalStorage المدمجة بمتصفحك فقط لحفظ خيارات واجهتك، كفلتر اللغة وتذكر موافقتك على نافذة التنبيهات المنبثقة. هذه البيانات تظل في جهازك تماماً.
